page_metadata.biotools__summary: Textual similarity search engine. This server can parse and summarize the results of an abstract similarity search to find appropriate journals for publication, authors with expertise in a given field, and documents similar to a submitted query.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Textual similarity search engine. This server can parse and summarize the results of an abstract similarity search to find appropriate journals for publication, authors with expertise in a given field, and documents similar to a submitted query.
